title: centaurea × frayana
intro: Centaurea × frayana, also known as Frayana, is a hybrid plant species within the Centaurea genus, known for its ornamental and medicinal values. The plant's medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Centaurea × frayana include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and supporting the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for conditions such as arthritis and wounds. Herbal preparations of Centaurea × frayana typically involve infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be used internally or applied topically to harness its medicinal properties.
